titleStmt.title: SII 29.52: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 52. (A.R. No. 94 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALAGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in front of the Hanuman temple in the village.

Mentions the rule of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇa. It records the gift of the village Śandularahaḷu in Kōḍada-12 as taḷavṛitti to Ramēśvara-Paṇḍita, the disciple of Tējōnidhi-Paṇḍita of the Kāḷāmukha sect for worship and offerings, feeding the students and maintaining a satra [choultry] in the temple of Uttarēśvara by Toṇḍaya-Cholamahārāja of Kandūru who was governing Koḷḷipāke-7000. Further gifts of money made by several officials are also recorded. Kanbeṇa of the maṭha wrote the record.
It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, uttarāyaṇa saṅkrānti. It corresponds to 1088 A.D., December 24, [Sunday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhu
vanāśraya
śrīpṛthvīvalla
bha mahārājā
dhi rāja paramē
śvara parama bha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śraya kulati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrī ma
tribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhi
pravardhamā
namācaṁdrā
rkka tāraṁ kalyā
ṇada nelevī
ḍinōḷ sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁ geyyuttu
mire tatpāda pa
dmōpa jīvi

samadhigata paṁca ma
hāśabda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīrama
hēśvara kōḍūrppu
ravarēśvara sūryya
vaṁśōdbhava kulati
ḷakaṁ kāsyapa gōtra
ka(ri)kālānvayaṁ
nāmādi sama
sta prasasti sahi
taṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kandū
ra toṇḍaya co
ḷa mahārāja
rkkoḷḷipāke Ercchāsi
ramu maṁ sukhadi
nāḷuttuṁ śrī ma
ccāḷukya vikrama kā
lada 13 neya vibha
va saṁvatsaraduttarā
yaṇa saṁkrānti
parvva nimittadiṁ
kāḷāmukhānvaya

kulatiḷakarappa śrī
mat rāmēśvara pa
ṇḍitadēvaravaraśi
ṣyar yamaniyamasvā
dhyāya dhyānadhāra
ṇa maunānuṣṭāṇa
japa samādhi saṁ
pannaṁ vibudha prasa
nnaṁ niravadya śabda vi
dyāmara taraṁgiṇī
pravāhā prakṣā
ḷita vā(gvi)ḷāpaṁ sa
kaḷa kaḷākuḷasiddhā
ntatattvamaṇipradī
paṁ jñēya vidyāṁbhō
dhi nidrācyādhi pri
dyōtanaṁ tapō lakṣmī
līlānikētanaṁ sāḍaṁ
baradigaṁbara raktāṁbhō
rāḷidāni nikuruṁba
buddhi vidhvaṁsinikhi
ḷa jagatpavitraṁ vā
di trijētraṁ guru
kuḷa samuddharaṇaṁ

śrī mattējōnidhi paṇḍitadē
vara śirṣya rāmēśvara pa
ṇḍitadēvargge dhārāpūrvvaka
māge śrīmaduttarēśvaradē
vara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁga
bhōgakkaṁ malliyōduva chā
trarigaṁ satrakkaṁ koḍada
panneraḍaṟa baḻiya śaṁdū
larahaḷaṁ taḷavṛtti
yiṁ sarvvanamasyamāge
koṭṭeralligebaresaka pe
rggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷu kuḍuva
gadyāṇa veraḍu suṁkada
varu kuḍuva gadyāṇa
voṁdu Aṁgaḍi yeraḍu
gappeyavaru kuḍuva gadyā
ṇavoṁdu koḷlipāke
Ercchāsirada prabhu gāvu
ṇḍa gadyaroḷoṁdu binna me
koṭṭa rī dharmmava naḍi
yisaduvargge gaṁgage bāṇa
rāsiyoḷ pannircchāsi
ra kavilayamaṁ brā
hmaṇaruvaṁ śrīparvvata
doḷ sāsira tapōdha
narumaṁ kondapāpa .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēdva sundharā
svaṣṭhi varṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . maṭadadā
tāraṁ kanbeṇa bare
daṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
